title: psychotria erecta f. fluctuans
intro: Psychotria erecta f. fluctuans, also known as the wild coffee or yerba de Monte, is a variety of the Psychotria genus, a plant native to tropical regions of Central and South America. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to reduce inflammation, relieve pain, and act as an antioxidant, due to the presence of various bioactive compounds such as alkaloids and flavonoids. The health benefits of Psychotria erecta f. fluctuans include its potential to improve cognitive function, reduce anxiety and stress, and support the immune system. In herbal preparations, the leaves of the plant can be consumed as a tea, made by infusing the leaves in hot water, or used in capsule or tincture form.
